subtasks.description: Query spend data for Adobe and Microsoft products across all 2024 quarters. Calculate quarter-over-quarter spend change (Q1→Q2, Q2→Q3, Q3→Q4) for each publisher and rank products within each publisher by Q4 spend.

plan.cost_rationale: Single sql_gen subtask at mid tier: This requires a multi-table join (products, publishers, spend history), multiple window functions (LAG for QoQ calculation, ROW_NUMBER for ranking by Q4 spend within publisher), and filtering/aggregation across 4 quarters of 2024. Mid tier (Sonnet) is appropriate for this moderate-complexity multi-window query. No cross-source reconciliation needed since all spend data comes from the same warehouse. One subtask suffices because all the calculation (QoQ changes, ranking, filtering) can be done in a single SQL statement with CTEs and window functions.

output.sql:
WITH quarterly_spend AS (
  SELECT
    publisher,
    product,
    fiscal_quarter,
    SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend
  FROM consumption_facts
  WHERE publisher IN ('Adobe', 'Microsoft')
    AND fiscal_year = 2024
    AND fiscal_quarter IN (1, 2, 3, 4)
  GROUP BY publisher, product, fiscal_quarter
),
pivoted AS (
  SELECT
    publisher,
    product,
    MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 1 THEN total_spend ELSE 0 END) AS q1_spend,
    MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 2 THEN total_spend ELSE 0 END) AS q2_spend,
    MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 3 THEN total_spend ELSE 0 END) AS q3_spend,
    MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 4 THEN total_spend ELSE 0 END) AS q4_spend
  FROM quarterly_spend
  GROUP BY publisher, product
)
SELECT
  publisher,
  product,
  q1_spend,
  q2_spend,
  q3_spend,
  q4_spend,
  (q2_spend - q1_spend) AS q1_to_q2_change,
  (q3_spend - q2_spend) AS q2_to_q3_change,
  (q4_spend - q3_spend) AS q3_to_q4_change,
  CASE
    WHEN q1_spend = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ROUND(((q2_spend - q1_spend) / q1_spend) * 100, 2)
  END AS q1_to_q2_pct_change,
  CASE
    WHEN q2_spend = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ROUND(((q3_spend - q2_spend) / q2_spend) * 100, 2)
  END AS q2_to_q3_pct_change,
  CASE
    WHEN q3_spend = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ROUND(((q4_spend - q3_spend) / q3_spend) * 100, 2)
  END AS q3_to_q4_pct_change,
  RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY publisher ORDER BY q4_spend DESC) AS q4_spend_rank_within_publisher
FROM pivoted
ORDER BY publisher, q4_spend_rank_within_publisher
